task_description: Create /public/pages/linkpenting.html - a password-protected interactive page with accordion UI containing all links from the Manulife File Penting source file. This page is for nasabah and tim Project Cuan. Add navigation links in index.html, hamburger menu, and footer.

verification.summary: Static HTML site - no build/test needed. Verified: linkpenting.html exists (759 lines), password protection works, 14 product accordion cards present with correct Google Drive links from source, quick-nav buttons at top, navigation links added to header.html, footer.html, and index.html.
